items.title: When a policy promotes “free” stuff without increasing productivity, it accelerates scarcity. By accelerating scarcit…
items.body: When a policy promotes “free” stuff without increasing productivity, it accelerates scarcity. By accelerating scarcity, it promotes the concentration of power. Thus, a “free” policy sounds democratic but is authoritarian…
